alkylation concentration: the alkylation reaction was subsequently quenched by the addition of 15 µL of 10 mM DTT
cleavage agent: Sequencing grade trypsin/lysC (Promega, Madison, WI) was added in 1:20 (wt/wt) enzyme/protein ratio
collision energy: stepped HCD collision energy of 20%, 30% and 45%
instrument: on an Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometry system
labeling: Mass spectrometry data was acquired in the positive ion data dependent acquisition (DDA) mode.
reduction reagent: the alkylation reaction was subsequently quenched by the addition of 15 µL of 10 mM DTT
reduction concentration: the alkylation reaction was subsequently quenched by the addition of 15 µL of 10 mM DTT
